decision.summary: Close R1 as the local WebGPT bridge maturity stage and proceed into R2G to build a local ChatGPT MCP/App bridge skeleton and dry-run path before any live ChatGPT connector exposure.
why_now: R1-6 audited the v0 through v3 WebGPT bridge and confirmed final-approved R3-9R evidence is reachable through app-owned report and artifact references.
R1-7 smoke validation passed against the final-approved project evidence.
R1-8 produced a Chinese operator runbook and prompt pack that keeps GPT outputs as drafts, proposals, or pending human-confirmation requests.

Official OpenAI Apps SDK documentation confirms that ChatGPT Apps are built around an MCP server, tool contracts, optional UI resources, auth where needed, and later connector/testing/submission steps.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Build your MCP server
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: MCP server, tools, optional server instructions, auth enforcement, structured data, and optional UI bundle responsibilities.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - MCP concept
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Minimal MCP capabilities: list tools, call tools, return components, and optional initialization instructions.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Define tools
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Tool contract assumptions: one job per tool, explicit inputs, predictable structured outputs, and separate read/write tools.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Authentication
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Future authenticated MCP server requirements and OAuth 2.1 / protected-resource metadata assumptions.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Security & Privacy
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Least privilege, explicit consent, defense in depth, redaction, and human confirmation for irreversible operations.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Connect from ChatGPT
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Future developer-mode connector and metadata refresh assumptions, not executed in R1-9.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK - Submit and maintain your app
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Public review/submission prerequisite that the MCP server must be a real publicly accessible endpoint, not a local or placeholder endpoint.

official_openai_docs_used.title: Apps SDK llms.txt
official_openai_docs_used.used_for: Official documentation map for Apps SDK pages and Markdown twins.

remains_local_only: localhost-oriented WebGPT bridge v0 through v3
Human Workbench confirmation as production truth gate
local media artifacts and app-owned IDs
Chinese operator runbook and prompt pack

r2g_task_sequence_confirmed.purpose: Audit current official ChatGPT Apps SDK and MCP requirements against the local R1 bridge.
Freeze MCP tool schemas and structured output contracts.
Implement local MCP server skeleton without public exposure.
Run local end-to-end dry-run for the handoff flow.
Validate human confirmation and write gates.
Close out local MCP packaging readiness.
Prepare, but do not execute, future live ChatGPT connector authorization.

r2g_validity.reason: The task sequence matches official Apps SDK ordering: audit requirements, define security, freeze tool contracts, build local MCP server, dry-run, validate write gates, then close local packaging before any live connector authorization.
r2g_validity.stop_boundary_after_f: R2G-G remains FOLLOW_UP and must not auto-run until promoted and separately authorized.
